scripts.deploy:dev: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Nexus.ts --network hardhatMainnet
scripts.deploy:sep: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Nexus.ts --network sepolia

scripts.deploy:stst: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Nexus.ts --network sonicTestnet
